mapper.select: select (select count(1) from sys_user where is_deleted = 0) as user_count, (select count(1) from venue where is_deleted = 0) as venue_count, (select count(1) from activity where is_deleted = 0) as activity_count, (select count(1) from booking) as booking_count, (select count(1) from message where is_deleted = 0) as message_count, (select count(1) from booking where breach_flag = 1) as breach_booking_count
select status, count(1) as count from booking group by status order by status asc

select b.venue_id as venue_id, v.name as venue_name, count(1) as booking_count from booking b left join venue v on b.venue_id = v.id group by b.venue_id, v.name order by booking_count desc, b.venue_id desc limit #{limit}
select a.id as activity_id, a.title as activity_title, a.current_signup_count as signup_count from activity a where a.is_deleted = 0 order by a.current_signup_count desc, a.id desc limit #{limit}
